TNR.description:
Trust Node Record - Durable node membership state for an SDN trust graph.

TNR records preserve isolated trust graph nodes that do not currently have
an active trust edge. The current graph is a projection over the latest TNR
and TRE records, where deleted records are tombstones.

NODE_ID.description: Stable trust graph node identifier, normally an SDN peer ID or account id.

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this node record was created.

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this node record was last updated.

DELETED.description: True when this record tombstones the node from the current graph.

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the node/provider that issued this trust graph record.

PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.description: Provider signature over the trust node record.
